summary: Receives uncompressed broadcast video over an ST 2110 IP network from supported devices (Blackmagic IP, Deltacast DELTA-ip-ST2110). Configure NIC and channel routing via the ST2110 Device CHOP.

key_params.name: device
key_params.note: Path to the ST2110 Device CHOP that owns the NIC config

key_params.name: channel
key_params.note: Source channel/stream index on the device

common_gotchas: ST 2110 needs a properly configured NIC (often 25G+) with PTP grandmaster on the network — see the ST2110 Device CHOP first.
PTP synchronization is mandatory for clean reception; without it, frames will tear or drop.
